hooks.command: bash /Users/mac/hfsp-labs-colosseum/scripts/standup.sh 2>/dev/null || true

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q '^git commit' && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\[(claude|kimi|codex|gemini)\]'; then echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Commit blocked: message must start with [claude], [kimi], [codex], or [gemini]"}'; fi

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push.*--force.*main|git push.*-f.*main'; then echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Force push to main is blocked. Create a PR instead."}'; fi

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q '72\.62\.239\.63'; then echo '{"systemMessage":"⚠️  Production VPS command. nginx changes are frozen during launch window (Fri 12-18 UTC)."}'; fi

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'pay_with_sol|sendTransaction|mainnet'; then echo '{"systemMessage":"⚠️  MAINNET TRANSACTION DETECTED. Double-check wallet address and amount before proceeding."}'; fi

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'sites-enabled'; then ssh root@72.62.239.63 "cp /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/clawdrop.live /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/clawdrop.live.bak.$(date +%s)" 2>/dev/null || true; echo '{"systemMessage":"✅ nginx config backed up before edit"}'; fi
input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); echo "$(date -u +%H:%M:%S) [claude] $cmd" >> /Users/mac/hfsp-labs-colosseum/.claude/bash-log.txt 2>/dev/null || true

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE 'src/server\.ts|rate-limit\.ts|budget-guard\.ts|poly-agent\.ts'; then echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"That file belongs to Kimi. Write your change to .claude/WORKLOG.md Kimi inbox instead."}'; fi

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.env$'; then echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Never write .env directly. Edit .env.example and tell the user to copy it."}'; fi

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$file" | grep -q 'packages/trial-api/src/'; then cd /Users/mac/hfsp-labs-colosseum/packages/trial-api && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -5; fi

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$file" | grep -q 'src/tools/'; then cd /Users/mac/hfsp-labs-colosseum/packages/trial-api && node -e "import('./dist/tools/index.js').then(m=>m.getSolPrice.execute({context:{}})).then(r=>console.log('✅ SOL price:',r.price_usd)).catch(e=>console.error('❌',e.message))" 2>&1; fi

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.ts$' && echo "$file" | grep -q 'hfsp-labs-colosseum'; then cd /Users/mac/hfsp-labs-colosseum && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -10 || true; fi

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$file" | grep -q 'budget-guard'; then echo '{"systemMessage":"💸 budget-guard.ts modified. Verify TRIAL_DAILY_BUDGET_USD cap is still enforced and recordSpend() math is correct."}'; fi

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$file" | grep -q 'clawdrop-mcp.*tools\.ts'; then echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"hook","version":"1"}}}' | node /Users/mac/clawdrop-mcp/dist/index.js 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'clawdrop-mcp' && echo '✅ MCP server OK' || echo '❌ MCP server failed to start'; fi

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE 'WORKLOG\.md|HANDOFFS\.md'; then cd /Users/mac/hfsp-labs-colosseum && git add .claude/WORKLOG.md .claude/HANDOFFS.md && git commit -m '[claude] orchestration: update coordination files' --no-verify 2>/dev/null || true; fi
input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'nginx'; then ssh root@72.62.239.63 'nginx -t 2>&1' | tail -3; fi

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'systemctl reload|docker run|nginx'; then sleep 2 && curl -sf --max-time 5 https://clawdrop.live/api/health && echo '✅ /api/health OK' || echo '❌ /api/health FAILED'; fi
input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git push'; then gh pr list --repo lpsmurf/hfsp-labs-colosseum 2>/dev/null | head -5 || true; fi

wl=/Users/mac/hfsp-labs-colosseum/.claude/WORKLOG.md; last=$(git -C /Users/mac/hfsp-labs-colosseum log --format='%ar' -1 -- .claude/WORKLOG.md 2>/dev/null || echo 'never'); echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"📋 WORKLOG last updated: $last. Run 'bash scripts/standup.sh' to check team status.\"}"
hour=$(date -u +%H); if [ "$hour" -ge 18 ]; then bash /Users/mac/hfsp-labs-colosseum/scripts/day-close.sh 2>/dev/null | tail -20; fi
